lines.speaker: Captain Sdiar
lines.text: Beyond this wall you'll find the Kebos Lowlands. Most of the region is lizardman territory. We're here to keep them from entering Kourend.

lines.speaker: Captain Sdiar
lines.text: We used to keep this passage properly barricaded shut, but then the fancy historians from the Arceuus Library wanted to go do some research out there.

lines.speaker: Captain Sdiar
lines.text: Soon the farmers joined them, and before you knew it, everyone wanted to go explore. Some of them have even started living out there.

lines.speaker: Captain Sdiar
lines.text: I can see it all ending badly, but that's the problem with intellectuals - they always think they know better.

lines.speaker: Captain Sdiar
lines.text: Anyway, maybe they'll all get themselves killed. Then we can put the barricade back up.

lines.speaker: Captain Sdiar
lines.text: If you go out there yourself, give the lizardmen a kicking from me. They've killed too many of my soldiers.

sections.title: Prior to the release of Chambers of Xeric

lines.speaker: Captain Sdiar
lines.text: Beyond these walls is a Lizardman settlement, we're defending against it.

lines.speaker: Captain Sdiar
lines.text: Who knows, all I know is offence is the best type of defence, we will attack soon, will you help us, brave warrior?

lines.speaker: Captain Sdiar
lines.text: Oh, the assault is not for a while, go train and prepare, for there will be all sorts of grand rewards from this expedition.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Rewards? I'm in! Hopefully some brand new armour or something.
